title: Minimal Non-nilpotent and Locally Nilpotent Fusion Systems
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: The main purpose of this note is to show that there is a one-to-one correspondence between minimal non-nilpotent (resp., locally nilpotent) saturated fusion systems and finite p′-core-free p-constrained minimal non-nilpotent (resp., locally p-nilpotent) groups.
